description: Colophon. Scribe: Natan ha-Kohen b. Yeshuʿa b. Yaʿaqov b. Yeshuʿa b. Yosef b. Peraḥya b. Shefaṭya. "In the colophons of books it is not uncommon to find the copyist mentioning his forefathers up to the seventh or eighth generation." (Goitein, Med. Soc., vi, 11 n.57)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
